import React, { useEffect } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import CatalogueCard from "../components/CatalogueCard"; function EmpDashboard({ setModuleName }) { const cards = [ { link: "/master/office", title: "Office Management", subtitle: "Insert, Update Office", bgColor: "#eff6ff", iconColor: "#1d4ed8", icon: "fa fa-building" }, { link: "/master/employee", title: "Employee Management", subtitle: "Add, Verify and update employee details", bgColor: "#f0fdf4", iconColor: "#15803d", icon: "fa fa-user" }, { link: "/master/usermanagement", title: "User Management", subtitle: "Add, Verify and update user details", bgColor: "#fffbeb", iconColor: "#d97706", icon: "fa fa-users" }, { link: "/master/schememasterentry", title: "Scheme Master Entry", subtitle: "Add and update scheme master data", bgColor: "#fef2f2", iconColor: "#dc2626", icon: "fa fa-list-alt" }, ]; useEffect(() => { setModuleName("Employee Dashboard"); }, []); return (

); } export default EmpDashboard;
